title: Boat Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Boat Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Boat Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Boat Digital Technologies:
Boat Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat Digital Technologies!
